steps.title: Identify the structural setup
steps.content: The passage characterizes C. geaster as selective, then immediately uses a colon to signal what follows elaborates on that trait.

steps.title: Recognize the elaboration
steps.content: The underlined portion details which tree species and substrates host C. geaster, showing what the selectivity trait means in practice. The other choices either misidentify this as explanation rather than elaboration, highlight non-existent impacts, or confuse selectivity with earlier uncertainty. That matches choice D — D is correct.
